doc_title: Churn analysis using deep convolutional neural networks and autoencoders

Russakovsky, Olga, Jia Deng, Hao Su, Jonathan Krause, Sanjeev Satheesh, Sean Ma, Zhiheng Huang et al. \"Imagenet large scale visual recognition challenge.\" International Journal of Computer Vision 115.3 (2015): 211-252. (1997) None of these appear to be DOC1, DOC2, or DOC3 based on the titles: - DOC1: "MUlTimodAL DeEP LEARNING OF Word-OF-MOUTH TEXT AND DEMOGRAPHICS TO PREDICT CUSTOMER RATING: HANDLING CONSUMER HETEROGENEITY IN MARKETING" - DOC2: "Churn Prediction with Sequential Data and Deep Neural Networks A Comparative Analysis*" - DOC3: "An Efficient Multimodal Learning Framework to Comprehend Consumer Preferences Using BERT and Cross-Attention" DOC4 does not appear to cite any of the other papers in this collection.
